globalHeaders.Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data: https://*.blob.core.windows.net; connect-src 'self' https://*.azurewebsites.net; frame-ancestors 'none';
